stories.headline: Mass graves with 171 bodies found in eastern DR Congo: Report
stories.description: A local governor says authorities found two mass graves in the outskirts of the eastern city of Uvira.

stories.headline: ‘A dangerous thing’: S Africa’s gang-ridden townships fear army deployment
stories.description: Critics wary of President Cyril Ramaphosa’s move to send military to tackle crime, drugs and gangs in three provinces.

stories.headline: UK investigating whether Epstein used air force bases for sex trafficking
stories.description: Probe of Royal Air Force bases comes amid concerns trafficked women were brought to UK on board Epstein’s private jets.

stories.headline: Chris Mason: Green Party win will prompt soul searching within Labour and questions for Starmer
stories.description: Starmer faces criticism as focus on Reform may have alienated Labour supporters.

stories.headline: ‘No longer a threat’: How Canada U-turned on India ahead of Carney visit
stories.description: Canadian officials say India is no longer a ‘security threat’ after allegations of transnational violence rocked ties.
